channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Drive 5 hours or fly 20 minutes? Remote towns suffer from lack of year-round flights
item.description: A federal program that pays airlines to operate in small and rural communities could have its budget cut in half, leaving parts of the country with no...

item.title: U.S. ambassador to Israel says Israel sent Iron Dome batteries, personnel to UAE
item.description: Israel sent Iron Dome anti-missile batteries and personnel to operate them to the United Arab Emirates to defend the country during the Iran war, the ...

item.title: 24 hours with 3 teenage birders: Welcome to the World Series of Birding
item.description: The three high-school birders, dubbed The Pete Dunnelins, have one day to count as many bird species across the state of New Jersey as physically poss...

item.title: The economic chilling effect of Trump's immigration crackdown
item.description: New research finds that ICE raids and deportation fears disrupted local economies, reduced work among undocumented immigrants, and may have hurt some ...
